segments.name: Continuing Education & Credentialing
segments.description: Organizations delivering mandatory or voluntary professional education tied to licenses, certifications, or regulatory compliance. Learners must complete training to maintain credentials.

segments.name: Professional Training & Development
segments.description: Companies selling professional skills training not tied to a specific license. B2B training companies, corporate training providers, and professional skills academies.

segments.name: Coaches & Consultants
segments.description: Individuals or small teams selling personal expertise through coaching programs, group sessions, and courses. Brand is typically the person.

segments.name: Industry Associations & Membership Orgs
segments.description: Professional associations and membership organizations providing education as a member benefit. Serve a defined community within a specific industry.

segments.name: Course Creators & Digital Educators
segments.description: Individuals or small businesses whose primary product is self-paced online courses sold to consumers. Building a scalable content business.

segments.name: Academic & Higher Education
segments.description: Universities, colleges, and K-12 institutions using the platform for credit-bearing or non-credit programs within institutional structures.

segments.name: Corporate Education & Customer Training
segments.description: Companies building educational content to train customers, partners, or employees on their own products. Education supports their core business, not IS their business.

segments.name: Health, Wellness & Fitness
segments.description: Health and wellness practitioners selling education to consumers or other practitioners. Built around health/wellness content at scale.

segments.name: Government & Public Sector Education
segments.description: Government agencies and public sector organizations delivering education or training to citizens, constituents, or the general public. Education is a public service, not a revenue product.
